  "text": "In the sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2 repository, the xDS v2 and v3 API handling is implemented across several key C++ source files:\n\n**Versioned Proto Type Conversion:**\n- `source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc` and `.h`: The core file for versioned type URL to gRPC service method mapping. It builds a `TypeUrlToV3ServiceMap` that maps v3 resource type URLs (e.g., `type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster`) to v3 service method descriptors. The comment notes this is 'versioned by transport_api_version', and historically contained both v2 and v3 service entries. Functions include `sotwGrpcMethod()`, `deltaGrpcMethod()`, and `restMethod()` for obtaining the correct versioned gRPC method.\n- `source/common/config/utility.h`/`.cc`: Contains the `checkTransportVersion` template function that validates transport API version configuration. It explicitly handles both V2 (deprecated/removed) and V3, logging warnings when V2 is configured.\n- `source/common/config/api_version.h`: Defines the `API_NO_BOOST` macro used during v2-to-v3 migration to force specific proto versions.\n\n**V2-to-V3 Field Renames (DiscoveryRequest):**\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto`: Defines v3 `DiscoveryRequest` with the annotation `option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type = \"envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest\"`, documenting the v2-to-v3 rename.\n- `api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto`: Defines the original v2 `DiscoveryRequest` and `DeltaDiscoveryRequest` messages.\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto` and `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto`: Define the AggregatedDiscoveryService for both v2 (using `envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest`) and v3 (using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.DiscoveryRequest`).\n- `api/envoy/config/core/v3/config_source.proto`: Defines `ApiVersion` enum with V2 (deprecated) and V3 values, used for transport version negotiation.\n\n**Dual-Version Subscription Handling in ADS gRPC:**\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: The SotW (State of the World) ADS gRPC client. It maintains per-type-URL `ApiState` objects and handles `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse` messages. The `GrpcMuxFactory` creates this mux using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: The unified mux implementation (template-based, handles both SotW via `GrpcMuxSotw` and Delta via `GrpcMuxDelta`). Also uses v3 `AggregatedDiscoveryService` methods.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: Delta xDS gRPC client using `DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_subscription_factory.cc`: Factory that creates gRPC subscriptions, selecting between `GrpcMuxSotw` and `GrpcMuxDelta` (unified) or `GrpcMuxImpl` and `NewGrpcMuxImpl` (legacy) based on runtime feature flags.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc`/`.h` and `delta_subscription_state.cc`/`.h`: Track per-type-URL subscription state for SotW and delta protocols respectively.\n\n**Proto Descriptor Validation:**\n- `source/server/proto_descriptors.cc`: Validates that v3 proto descriptors (service methods and message types) are available at startup.\n\n**V2 Compatibility (Test):**\n- `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h`: Forces linking of v2 protobuf service definitions (v2 ADS, SDS, HDS, LDS, RDS, CDS, EDS, SRDS, RLS) for integration tests.\n- `api/test/build/build_test.cc`: Validates that both v2 (`envoy.api.v2.*`) and other service method descriptors are available in the proto descriptor pool.\n\nIn Envoy v1.31.2, the v2 xDS transport protocol is deprecated and no longer supported. The production source code exclusively uses v3 gRPC methods and proto messages. However, the v2 proto definitions remain in the `api/envoy/api/v2/` directory for reference and backward-compatible schema migration, and test infrastructure still links v2 service definitions."
}

  "text": "In sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, the xDS v2 and v3 API handling spans several C++ source files:\n\n**Versioned Proto Type Conversion:**\n- `source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc`/`.h`: The core file for versioned type URL-to-gRPC-service-method mapping. It builds a TypeUrlToV3ServiceMap keyed by v3 resource type URLs (e.g., type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster), mapping to v3 service method descriptors. The comment notes the map is 'versioned by transport_api_version', and the MethodName type alias comment references both 'envoy.api.v2.RouteDiscoveryService.StreamRoutes' (v2) and 'envoy.service.route.v3.RouteDiscoveryService' (v3). Functions sotwGrpcMethod(), deltaGrpcMethod(), and restMethod() resolve v3 method descriptors by type URL.\n- `source/common/config/utility.h`/`.cc`: The checkTransportVersion<> template explicitly handles both V2 (deprecated) and V3 ApiVersion enum values, emitting a deprecation warning when V2 transport is configured.\n- `source/common/config/api_version.h`: Defines the API_NO_BOOST macro used throughout the codebase to pin proto messages to a specific version, preventing automatic API version boosting during v2-to-v3 migration.\n- `source/common/config/protobuf_link_hacks.h`: Forces linking of v3 service proto definitions (AdsDummy, SdsDummy, etc.); the test-only equivalent test/config/v2_link_hacks.h links v2 service stubs.\n\n**V2-to-V3 Field Renames (DiscoveryRequest):**\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto`: Defines v3 DiscoveryRequest with versioning annotation `previous_message_type = \"envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest\"`, documenting the v2-to-v3 rename. Same for DeltaDiscoveryRequest.\n- `api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto`: Original v2 DiscoveryRequest and DeltaDiscoveryRequest definitions.\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto`: v2 AggregatedDiscoveryService using `api.v2.DiscoveryRequest`.\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto`: v3 AggregatedDiscoveryService using `service.discovery.v3.DiscoveryRequest`.\n- `api/envoy/config/core/v3/config_source.proto`: Defines ApiVersion enum (AUTO, V2 deprecated, V3) and transport_api_version field in ApiConfigSource controlling which wire protocol is used.\n- `api/envoy/api/v2/core/config_source.proto`: v2 equivalent with ApiVersion enum.\n\n**Dual-Version Subscription Handling in ADS gRPC:**\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: The SotW ADS gRPC client. GrpcMuxFactory creates this using the v3 method `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`. Maintains per-type-URL ApiState objects; onDiscoveryResponse() handles incoming v3 DiscoveryResponse messages multiplexed across all subscribed type URLs.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: Unified template-based mux (GrpcMuxSotw / GrpcMuxDelta). Uses the same v3 StreamAggregatedResources / DeltaAggregatedResources methods. Selected by the `envoy.reloadable_features.unified_mux` runtime flag.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: Delta xDS gRPC client using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_subscription_factory.cc`: Factory selecting between GrpcMuxSotw/GrpcMuxDelta (unified) or GrpcMuxImpl/NewGrpcMuxImpl (legacy) based on runtime flags; uses sotwGrpcMethod()/deltaGrpcMethod() from type_to_endpoint to obtain the correct versioned gRPC method descriptor.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc`/`.h`: Per-type-URL SotW subscription state; getNextRequestInternal() constructs v3 DiscoveryRequest messages.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/delta_subscription_state.cc`/`.h`: Per-type-URL delta subscription state; getNextRequestAckless() constructs v3 DeltaDiscoveryRequest messages.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/delta_subscription_state.cc`: Legacy delta subscription state (non-unified mux path).\n- `source/server/proto_descriptors.cc`: Validates at startup that v3 proto descriptors (e.g., AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources) are available.\n\n**Test infrastructure for v2/v3 dual support:**\n- `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h`: Forces linking of v2 service proto stubs (ads, sds, rtds, hds, lds, rds, cds, eds, srds, rls), required by integration tests that still exercise v2 protocol paths.\n- `api/test/build/build_test.cc`: Validates both v2 (`envoy.api.v2.*`, `envoy.service.discovery.v2.*`) and other service method descriptors are present in the protobuf descriptor pool."
}

  "text": "In the sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2 repository, the xDS v2 and v3 API handling is implemented across several key C++ source files:\n\n**Versioned Proto Type Conversion:**\n- `source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc` and `.h`: The core file for versioned type URL to gRPC service method mapping. It builds a `TypeUrlToV3ServiceMap` that maps v3 resource type URLs (e.g., `type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster`) to v3 service method descriptors. The comment notes this is 'versioned by transport_api_version', and historically contained both v2 and v3 service entries. Functions include `sotwGrpcMethod()`, `deltaGrpcMethod()`, and `restMethod()` for obtaining the correct versioned gRPC method.\n- `source/common/config/utility.h`/`.cc`: Contains the `checkTransportVersion` template function that validates transport API version configuration. It explicitly handles both V2 (deprecated/removed) and V3, logging warnings when V2 is configured.\n- `source/common/config/api_version.h`: Defines the `API_NO_BOOST` macro used during v2-to-v3 migration to force specific proto versions.\n\n**V2-to-V3 Field Renames (DiscoveryRequest):**\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto`: Defines v3 `DiscoveryRequest` with the annotation `option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type = \"envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest\"`, documenting the v2-to-v3 rename.\n- `api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto`: Defines the original v2 `DiscoveryRequest` and `DeltaDiscoveryRequest` messages.\n- `api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto` and `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto`: Define the AggregatedDiscoveryService for both v2 (using `envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest`) and v3 (using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.DiscoveryRequest`).\n- `api/envoy/config/core/v3/config_source.proto`: Defines `ApiVersion` enum with V2 (deprecated) and V3 values, used for transport version negotiation.\n\n**Dual-Version Subscription Handling in ADS gRPC:**\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: The SotW (State of the World) ADS gRPC client. It maintains per-type-URL `ApiState` objects and handles `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse` messages. The `GrpcMuxFactory` creates this mux using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: The unified mux implementation (template-based, handles both SotW via `GrpcMuxSotw` and Delta via `GrpcMuxDelta`). Also uses v3 `AggregatedDiscoveryService` methods.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc`/`.h`: Delta xDS gRPC client using `DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_subscription_factory.cc`: Factory that creates gRPC subscriptions, selecting between `GrpcMuxSotw` and `GrpcMuxDelta` (unified) or `GrpcMuxImpl` and `NewGrpcMuxImpl` (legacy) based on runtime feature flags.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc`/`.h` and `delta_subscription_state.cc`/`.h`: Track per-type-URL subscription state for SotW and delta protocols respectively.\n\n**Proto Descriptor Validation:**\n- `source/server/proto_descriptors.cc`: Validates that v3 proto descriptors (service methods and message types) are available at startup.\n\n**V2 Compatibility (Test):**\n- `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h`: Forces linking of v2 protobuf service definitions (v2 ADS, SDS, HDS, LDS, RDS, CDS, EDS, SRDS, RLS) for integration tests.\n- `api/test/build/build_test.cc`: Validates that both v2 (`envoy.api.v2.*`) and other service method descriptors are available in the proto descriptor pool.\n\nIn Envoy v1.31.2, the v2 xDS transport protocol is deprecated and no longer supported. The production source code exclusively uses v3 gRPC methods and proto messages. However, the v2 proto definitions remain in the `api/envoy/api/v2/` directory for reference and backward-compatible schema migration, and test infrastructure still links v2 service definitions."
}
